constructs.instructions_verbatim: Rate how positive or negative the word makes you feel, from 1 (very negative) to 9 (very positive).
constructs.citation: Scott, G. G., Keitel, A., Becirspahic, M., Yao, B., & Sereno, S. C. (2019). The Glasgow Norms: Ratings of 5,500 words on nine scales. Behavior Research Methods, 51, 1258-1270.
constructs.instructions_llm: Rate the emotional valence of this word. Range: 1-9 (1 = very negative, 9 = very positive). Reply with one number.

constructs.instructions_verbatim: Rate how calm or aroused (excited) the word makes you feel, from 1 (very calm) to 9 (very aroused).
constructs.citation: Scott, G. G., Keitel, A., Becirspahic, M., Yao, B., & Sereno, S. C. (2019). The Glasgow Norms: Ratings of 5,500 words on nine scales. Behavior Research Methods, 51, 1258-1270.
constructs.instructions_llm: Rate the emotional arousal of this word. Range: 1-9 (1 = very calm, 9 = very aroused). Reply with one number.

constructs.instructions_verbatim: Rate how dominant or in control (versus controlled or submissive) the word makes you feel, from 1 (very controlled) to 9 (very in control).
constructs.citation: Scott, G. G., Keitel, A., Becirspahic, M., Yao, B., & Sereno, S. C. (2019). The Glasgow Norms: Ratings of 5,500 words on nine scales. Behavior Research Methods, 51, 1258-1270.
constructs.instructions_llm: Rate the sense of control this word evokes. Range: 1-9 (1 = very controlled/submissive, 9 = very in control/dominant). Reply with one number.

constructs.instructions_verbatim: Rate how abstract or concrete the word's meaning is, from 1 (very abstract) to 7 (very concrete).
constructs.citation: Scott, G. G., Keitel, A., Becirspahic, M., Yao, B., & Sereno, S. C. (2019). The Glasgow Norms: Ratings of 5,500 words on nine scales. Behavior Research Methods, 51, 1258-1270.
constructs.instructions_llm: Rate how concrete this word's meaning is. Range: 1-7 (1 = very abstract, 7 = very concrete). Reply with one number.

constructs.instructions_verbatim: Rate how easily the word evokes a mental image, from 1 (very hard to imagine) to 7 (very easy to imagine).
constructs.citation: Scott, G. G., Keitel, A., Becirspahic, M., Yao, B., & Sereno, S. C. (2019). The Glasgow Norms: Ratings of 5,500 words on nine scales. Behavior Research Methods, 51, 1258-1270.
constructs.instructions_llm: Rate how easily this word evokes a mental image. Range: 1-7 (1 = very hard to imagine, 7 = very easy to imagine). Reply with one number.

constructs.instructions_verbatim: Rate how familiar the word is, from 1 (very unfamiliar) to 7 (very familiar).
constructs.citation: Scott, G. G., Keitel, A., Becirspahic, M., Yao, B., & Sereno, S. C. (2019). The Glasgow Norms: Ratings of 5,500 words on nine scales. Behavior Research Methods, 51, 1258-1270.
constructs.instructions_llm: Rate how familiar this word is. Range: 1-7 (1 = very unfamiliar, 7 = very familiar). Reply with one number.

constructs.instructions_verbatim: Rate the age at which you learned the word, as a 1-7 band from 1 (learned earliest, in early childhood) to 7 (learned latest, in adulthood).
constructs.citation: Scott, G. G., Keitel, A., Becirspahic, M., Yao, B., & Sereno, S. C. (2019). The Glasgow Norms: Ratings of 5,500 words on nine scales. Behavior Research Methods, 51, 1258-1270.
constructs.instructions_llm: Estimate when this word is typically learned, as a 1-7 band from 1 (learned earliest, in early childhood) to 7 (learned latest, in adulthood). Reply with one number.

constructs.instructions_verbatim: Rate the size of what the word refers to, from 1 (very small) to 7 (very large).
constructs.citation: Scott, G. G., Keitel, A., Becirspahic, M., Yao, B., & Sereno, S. C. (2019). The Glasgow Norms: Ratings of 5,500 words on nine scales. Behavior Research Methods, 51, 1258-1270.
constructs.instructions_llm: Rate the physical size of what this word refers to. Range: 1-7 (1 = very small, 7 = very large). Reply with one number.

constructs.instructions_verbatim: Rate the word's gender association, from 1 (very feminine) to 7 (very masculine).
constructs.citation: Scott, G. G., Keitel, A., Becirspahic, M., Yao, B., & Sereno, S. C. (2019). The Glasgow Norms: Ratings of 5,500 words on nine scales. Behavior Research Methods, 51, 1258-1270.
constructs.instructions_llm: Rate the gender association of this word. Range: 1-7 (1 = very feminine, 7 = very masculine). Reply with one number.
